scripts.build:ui: rm -rf dist && cd ~/Cursos/Helsinki_University/full-stack-open-submission/part4/bloglist_fronted && pnpm run build && cp -r dist ~/Cursos/Helsinki_University/full-stack-open-submission/part4/bloglist_backend
scripts.deploy:full: pnpm run build:ui && cd ~/Cursos/Helsinki_University/full-stack-open-submission &&  git add . && git commit -m uibuild && git push
